name: rn-compliance
description: Scan and auto-fix Android/iOS app store policy violations in React Native projects

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key
anthropic_api_key.description: Used to identify unknown native libraries in APKs via Claude AI. Optional — provide either this or a Gemini API key.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API key (free)
gemini_api_key.description: Alternative to Anthropic for identifying unknown native libraries. Free tier available at aistudio.google.com. Optional.
